name: ops-sync
description: Infrastructure health and sync engine — scans all repos (local Mac + VPS + GitHub) for git state, tests, lint, CI/CD, systemd timers, LaunchAgents, and token freshness. Parallel multi-agent architecture with fix capabilities. Commands: /ops-sync (full scan), /ops-status (quick dashboard), /ops-fix (remediation), /ops-doctor (deep diagnostic).
